# Skill templates

Canonical markdown shapes referenced by the skills in this folder. Edit
these files when the canonical shape changes; the skills point here
rather than inlining markdown.

| Template | Used by |
|----------|---------|
| [epic.md](epic.md) | epic-create |
| [story-future.md](story-future.md) | story-create (§A) |
| [story-unplanned.md](story-unplanned.md) | story-create (§B), plan-epic |
| [story-planned-additions.md](story-planned-additions.md) | plan-story |
| [build-notes-entry.md](build-notes-entry.md) | build-story |
| [commit-messages.md](commit-messages.md) | build-story, build-epic |
| [skill-frontmatter.md](skill-frontmatter.md) | every SKILL.md (Stage 6) |
